penalties.description: Video content is not suitable for scoring - either too dark to evaluate or educational material rather than performance attempt

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed that this video cannot be scored as a task performance. Claude identified it as educational material with static images, while GPT-4o reported the video as too dark to evaluate. In either case, no actual task execution is visible, resulting in incomplete task status and zero score.

disagreements.claude_value: This appears to be an instructional video showing knot tying technique rather than a timed performance attempt. No timing markers, instruments, or actual task execution are visible.
disagreements.gpt_value: The video is too dark to evaluate any task completion.
disagreements.resolution: Combined both observations into general unsuitability description
disagreements.rationale: Both models identified fundamental inability to score the video, though for different technical reasons. The consensus captures that the video is not scoreable regardless of the specific cause.

Incomplete task results in automatic zero score without additional penalty deductions. The 420.0 deduction appears to be a calculation error as incomplete tasks receive zero total score through the automatic-zero condition, not through penalty arithmetic.
